testsuite.name: com.eteration.simplebanking.ControllerTests

testcase.name: givenId_CreditAndThenDebitMoreGetException_thenReturnJson()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Expected InsufficientBalanceException to be thrown
